summary: Code review of CharacterBuilder 7-step wizard rewrite and CharacterSheetFull vitals bar addition. Backend POST /api/characters requires auth (403 without token); could not execute end-to-end test in available token budget. Frontend code review confirms all required data-testids and fields are present.

backend.note: Backend smoke test attempted via curl returned 403 'Not authenticated'. Auth flow needs cookie/JWT setup not executed here.

frontend.note: Live Playwright not executed due to token budget. Code review only.

issues: VitalChip onClick used on <div> with role=button but no keyboard handler (Enter/Space) - minor a11y issue on Initiative roll trigger in CharacterSheetFull

CharacterBuilder.js: 7 steps correctly defined: edition, race, class, background, abilities, skills, review

All required data-testids present: edition-2014/2024, race-*, class-*, background-*, method-standard/point/roll, ability-*, skill-toggle-* (lowercase, hyphenated), character-name-input, alignment-select, portrait-input, builder-prev-btn, builder-next-btn, builder-submit-btn, step-*, builder-back-btn, clear-draft-btn, subclass-select, subrace-*
canAdvance() correctly enforces validation per step
goToStep() blocks forward jumps (line 274) - matches spec
Auto-save draft to 'rq_character_builder_draft_v2' on every state change (line 178-181) - confirmed
Edit mode loads via loadCharacterForEdit() and populates all new fields (subrace, skill_proficiencies)

POST payload (lines 314-344) includes ALL required new fields: skill_proficiencies, saving_throw_proficiencies, weapon_proficiencies, armor_proficiencies, tool_proficiencies, languages, racial_traits, class_features, subrace, alignment, speed
Primary ability star border (gold) implemented at line 666-670
ASI bonus '+ N = total' display at line 683-687
Skills step: backgroundSkills auto-locked (disabled+highlighted), classSkillCount enforced, +prof bonus added when proficient (line 757)
Review step: name input, alignment select, portrait URL, full summary card with portrait/identity/stats/skills/saves - all present
CharacterSheetFull.js: Vitals bar at lines 607-639 with data-testid='vitals-bar'
All testids present: current-hp, hp-decrease, hp-increase, vital-ac, vital-init, vital-speed, inspiration-toggle, sheet-back-btn
Identity block with portrait, name, race(subrace), class(subclass) Lv N at lines 587-604
VitalChip helper component defined at line 1074-1095
Inspiration toggle PATCHes character.inspiration via handleUpdateCharacter
data/characterRules5e.js: RACES: 11 races defined (Human, Elf, Dwarf, Halfling, Gnome, Half-Orc, Half-Elf, Tiefling, Aasimar, Goliath, Orc) - request says '12 race cards' but only 11 names listed in spec; matches code

BACKGROUNDS: 12 backgrounds (Acolyte, Criminal, Entertainer, Folk Hero, Guild Artisan, Hermit, Noble, Outlander, Sage, Sailor, Soldier, Urchin) - request says '13 backgrounds' but data has 12 - SPEC MISMATCH
Elf subraces include 'High Elf', 'Wood Elf', 'Dark Elf (Drow)' - matches spec

critical_code_review_comments: Spec says 13 backgrounds but data file has only 12 - main agent should verify whether to add 1 more (e.g., Charlatan) or update spec
Spec says 12 races but only 11 are enumerated in both spec and data - likely spec typo
VitalChip is a div with onClick - add onKeyDown for Enter/Space for keyboard accessibility (minor)
Backend auth blocks programmatic character creation testing without JWT - could not verify model_dump() accepts all new fields end-to-end via curl
loadCharacterForEdit sets method='manual' (line 138), but method state validation in canAdvance only checks 'point' branch - safe, but 'manual' is not in [standard, point, roll]; cosmetic
action_items: Main agent should run a logged-in Playwright/manual pass to fully verify the 7-step wizard end-to-end (login -> Forge Hero -> all 7 steps -> Submit -> sheet vitals bar)
Confirm backgrounds count: spec says 13 but data has 12 - add missing background or update spec
Add keyboard handler to VitalChip div for a11y
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code review confirms all data-testids and POST payload fields are wired. Backend POST /api/characters is auth-protected; next tester needs to execute login (cookie/JWT) before testing. Spec/data mismatch: backgrounds count (13 vs 12). Live Playwright run not performed - test manually or via authenticated automation. Existing character ID a1e7babc-c582-48ec-8a64-8c71501fa281 is for the user's account.
